payload.message:
Template job. Recommended settings:
- delivery.mode=none
- use explicit notify via sessions_send and dedupe via NOTIFY_SENT events

Run: node ~/.openclaw/workspace-god/skills/agent-orchestration-system/scripts/effectors/heartbeat_run.js --maxConcurrency=1 --opsConcurrency=2 --slaMinutes=60 --lockTtlMs=900000 --maxTotalSpawns=2
This performs: queue_sync (human view) -> autopilot -> execute_actions (event writes + NOTIFY_REQUEST + AOS_SPAWN_REQUEST).
